raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "Asserting a necessary precondition for intelligent accomplishment",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "Thought disconnected from purpose cannot yield intelligent accomplishment",
    "Purpose is an essential linking element between thought and achievement",
    "Intelligent accomplishment is a distinct category requiring this linkage"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "Internally coherent as a conditional claim but relies on undefined terms, making it somewhat circular or definitional",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "The statement is useful if purpose can be clearly defined and operationalized to guide thought toward measurable outcomes",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "The statement is misleading if intelligent accomplishments demonstrably arise from exploratory or purposeless thought"
}
